'''Ōyamadera''' (大山寺, also read as Oyamaji, Daisenji, and Taisanji) is a {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhist|1=Buddhism}} {{ill|Temple|en|Temple|WD=Q44539|lt=Temple|1=Temple}}. Temples with this name exist in various locations across Japan.
== Temples ==
* {{ill|Ōyamadera (Shirosato, Ibaraki)|ja|大山寺 (茨城県城里町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamadera (Shirosato, Ibaraki)|qq=}} - A temple located in {{ill|Shirosato, Ibaraki|en|Shirosato, Ibaraki|WD=Q1203068|lt=Shirosato|1=Shirosato, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Higashiibaraki District, Ibaraki|en|Higashiibaraki District, Ibaraki|WD=Q1154667|lt=Higashiibaraki District|1=Higashiibaraki District, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|WD=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Ōyamadera (Tochigi)|ja|大山寺 (栃木市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamadera (Tochigi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A temple located in [[:en:Tochigi, Tochigi|Tochigi City]], {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|WD=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Ōyamadera (Kamogawa, Chiba)|ja|大山寺 (鴨川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamadera (Kamogawa, Chiba)|1=Ōyama-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q28683161}} - A temple located in {{ill|Kamogawa, Chiba|en|Kamogawa, Chiba|WD=Q387211|lt=Kamogawa City|1=Kamogawa, Chiba}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture|1=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Ōyamadera (Isehara, Kanagawa)|ja|大山寺 (伊勢原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamadera (Isehara, Kanagawa)|1=Ōyama-dera Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11434610}} - A [[Shingon Daikakuji School|Shingon Daikakuji sect]] temple located in {{ill|Isehara, Kanagawa|en|Isehara, Kanagawa|WD=Q734520|lt=Isehara City|1=Isehara, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|WD=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. Commonly referred to as Ōyama Fudō. * {{ill|Ōyamadera (Iwakura, Aichi)|ja|大山寺 (岩倉市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamadera (Iwakura, Aichi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A temple located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|en|Iwakura, Aichi|WD=Q648275|lt=Iwakura City|1=Iwakura, Aichi}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Taisan-ji (Kobe)|en|Taisan-ji (Kobe)|WD=Q3514065|lt=Taisan-ji (Kobe)|1=Taisan-ji (Kobe)}} - A [[Tendai sect|Tendai]] temple located in [[:en:Kobe, Hyōgo|Kobe City]], {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. Former temple name was Ōyamadera. It was an imperial prayer temple of Empress Genmei. * {{ill|Daisen-ji|en|Daisen-ji|WD=Q3012163|lt=Daisen-ji|1=Daisen-ji}} - A Tendai sect temple located in {{ill|Daisen, Tottori|en|Daisen, Tottori|WD=Q1204975|lt=Daisen Town|1=Daisen, Tottori}}, {{ill|Saihaku District, Tottori|en|Saihaku District, Tottori|WD=Q917024|lt=Saihaku District|1=Saihaku District, Tottori}}, {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|WD=Q133935|lt=Tottori Prefecture|1=Tottori Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Ōyamadera (Onomichi, Hiroshima)|ja|大山寺 (尾道市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamadera (Onomichi, Hiroshima)|1=Taisan-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29116035}} - A temple located in [[:en:Onomichi, Hiroshima|Onomichi City]], {{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|WD=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Taisan-ji (Kamiita)|en|Taisan-ji (Kamiita)|WD=Q3514063|lt=Taisan-ji (Kamiita)|1=Taisan-ji (Kamiita)}} - A temple located in {{ill|Kamiita, Tokushima|en|Kamiita, Tokushima|WD=Q1350072|lt=Kamiita Town|1=Kamiita, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Itano District, Tokushima|en|Itano District, Tokushima|WD=Q1156025|lt=Itano District|1=Itano District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. The first stop of the {{ill|Twenty Sacred Places Outside Shikoku|ja|四国別格二十霊場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twenty Sacred Places Outside Shikoku|1=Pilgrimage of the 20 exceptional temples of Shikoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11419707}}. * {{ill|Ōyamadera (Ōita)|ja|大山寺 (大分市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamadera (Ōita)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A temple located in [[:en:Ōita, Ōita|Ōita City]], {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|WD=Q133924|lt=Ōita Prefecture|1=Ōita Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Ōyamadera (Ibusuki, Kagoshima)|ja|大山寺 (指宿市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamadera (Ibusuki, Kagoshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A temple located in [[:en:Ibusuki, Kagoshima|Ibusuki City]], {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|en|Kagoshima Prefecture|WD=Q15701|lt=Kagoshima Prefecture|1=Kagoshima Prefecture}}.
== Railway Stations ==
* {{ill|Ōyama Cable Car|ja|大山寺駅 (神奈川県)|Ōyama Cable Car=Ōyama Cable Car|lt=Ōyamadera Station (Kanagawa)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyama Cable Car|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大山観光電鉄大山鋼索線|1=Ōyama Cable Car|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q864604}} (おおやまでらえき) - A station on the {{ill|Ōyama_Cable_Car|en|Ōyama_Cable_Car|WD=Q864604|lt=Ōyama Cable Line|1=Ōyama Cable Car}} operated by the [[Ōyama Tourism Railway]], located in [[Ōyama, Isehara, Kanagawa|Ōyama]], [[Isehara City]], Kanagawa Prefecture. * {{ill|Taisanji_Station|en|Taisanji_Station|WD=Q7676396|lt=Taisanji Station|1=Taisanji Station}} (たいさんじえき) - A station on the {{ill|Meitetsu Inuyama Line|en|Meitetsu Inuyama Line|WD=Q6810411|lt=Inuyama Line|1=Meitetsu Inuyama Line}} operated by [[:en:Nagoya Railroad|Meitetsu]], located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|en|Iwakura, Aichi|WD=Q648275|lt=Iwakura City|1=Iwakura, Aichi}}, Aichi Prefecture.
